dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
com.tokenatlas.TokenAtlas
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
$(MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET)
NSApplication
Notch Island media controls may use Apple Events for local music apps when the media module is enabled.
Notch Island can read local Apple Music playback metadata when the media module is enabled.
Notch Island can capture local audio levels for visualizer modules when audio features are enabled.
Notch Island can show Bluetooth audio device status when enabled.
Notch Island can show calendar and reminder previews when enabled.
Notch Island can show camera privacy indicators when enabled.
Notch Island can show contact-related calendar context when enabled.
Notch Island weather or context modules may request location when enabled.
Notch Island can show microphone privacy indicators when enabled.
TokenAtlas can import selected images when you choose image-based workflows.
Notch Island can show reminder previews when enabled.
Notch Island assistant features may use speech recognition when enabled.
Notch Island can use screen recording for recording indicators and screen assistant modules when enabled.
https://can4hou6joeng4.github.io/TokenAtlas/appcast.xml
6T109AAt5nrU9ltLfWEAPMgEilSfz443+MLFCPVzYXQ=
